review_title: The ideal tool for managing LinkedIn and email tasks efficiently.
author: Vitor S.
pros: I like GetSales because their dashboard is great and their team helps a lot. They know a lot and made our campaign successful. The platform is easy to use for making changes and getting insights.
cons: If you have a big database, get ready to spend a long time enriching the data.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Amazing experience. I would 100% recommend it.
author: Adham E.
pros: They are constantly changing and improving. I was one of the earliest users of GetSales 2.0 and it helped me save on 3 other tools I was using. I now use it for all my
cons: The frequency of updates sometimes affects downtime.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Georgy N.
pros: Add find people who just joined LI good value for price and facebook groups
cons: Roles are not visible good results overall
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with the platform is good, it works smoothly. Its very cost effective as well!
author: Aniruddh G.
pros: Single solution with anti detect browser
cons: Interface of the platform is not that attractive
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great value product with excellent customer support
description: GetSales is a great piece of software. I use it for linkbuilding and promoting my events. It does the job well and for a fraction of the price of similar software. I highly recommend this tool for teams on a budget looking to automate their outreach and comms in anway.
author: Will R.
pros: Excellent customer support. Fast response time. Direct Slack communication. Great value in comparison to other products. Proactive dev team that introduce new features regularly. Good scraping tools for LinkedIn (browser plugin). AI features.
cons: Wish it showed more metrics about domains for linkbuilding purposes. Some technical problems arise, but devs are quick to fix. UI sometimes feels a bit much. Deduplication needs to be more certain when importing lists.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Worth It! Try it and see.
author: Sonia D.
pros: They start with security first. Protecting your account is important, unlike other LinkedIn apps that can put your account at risk. Support is fast, easy, and helpful. The team is thinking next level, and always innovating and updating. The app itself does whatever you automate it to do with ease. They have automation templates to get you thinking smarter about your strategy.
cons: I wish I found [sensitive content hidden] and team sooner. The app is improved weekly, so any minor issues are fixed without long delays.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A must-have for everyone that wants to level-up their linkedin outreach in an effective and efficient way!
description: Easy unboarding, great and very responsive customer service, and a tool that is easy to set up and maintain.
author: Helena D.
pros: The simple setup of a nurturing system for my linkedin connections
cons: I am still waiting for their CRM tool that works with GetSales. If it is as good as GetSales, it will be a hell of a combination
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Neha N.
pros: Getsales' lead gen features are seriously effective and will boost your efforts big time. The interface is super easy to use, and the support team is on point.
cons: Just a heads up—the pricing might be a bit steep for smaller businesses, and work on better reporting and integrations.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Wonderful Leads Genration in short time
description: This is wonderful tool to increase the penetration of market in a short amount of time.
author: Meenu A.
pros: GetSales.io provides a very institutive interface where we can get automatic leads to our products. They group the leads on the basis of location, Age group, Sex etc. and many more Business parameters. We can import and export the files in various formats.
cons: The Contact database contains lot of fake and incorrect information.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very helpful and the support always ready to help
author: Cassiano C.
pros: Easy to use and any help the Support is very fast in solving problems.
cons: In the beginning but as I sad the support reach me out and helped me very fast
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Very helpful CRM and good product overall.
author: Jack L.
pros: GetSales.io is genuinely a relatively cheap product for lead management and a CRM, and still manages to be inexpensive. I would recommend Get Sales for newer companies but I'd say some of the features need a little more work to be able to compare with other CRM tools. My company uses GetSales.io for some tasks such as the CRM but we use other software's for some other services.
cons: Some of the features need work, for example the AI sales assistant acts as you would expect and how other AI software's such as ChatGPT API may, and has its flaws. I would test all of the services offered and then figure out which are a necessity for your company and which ones that don't work well can be outsourced.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: A user-friendly platform with an attentive customer support.
author: Elena M.
pros: Getsales is very easy to use. Once you start uploading your target audience into the platform. YOu're easily able to verify, segment them, and add them to the right funnel.
cons: Not being able to reach more than 100 connections per week.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I am happy with the platform. It suiy=ts a need on our team.
author: wilfred K.
pros: I liked the fact that GetSales can help me augment my Linkedin outreach while providing me with contact data I may not already have.
cons: Customer Support can be spotty, but I have seen improvement.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: As a sales manager, I've found Getsales to be a valuable tool for tracking our team's performance and managing our sales pipeline.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: One thing I really liked about getsales was how chill their platform was. It gave me loads of options to tweak stuff and make it just right for what I needed.
cons: Enhance feature customization for specific business needs. Pricing might be steep for smaller businesses. Improve integrations with other software.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Nour A.
pros: GetSales is easy to use and set up with a simple interface. It automates lead capture process and build customer relationships through automated follow-ups. Also, it tracks leads over time to measure progress which is something so important. Moreover, importing and exporting is easy and fast.Furthermore, they have an amazing support team. They are collaborative, reply fast compared to any other lead generation platform and they solve the problems ALWAYS!
cons: No tool is perfect for sure. When it comes to things I'd love to be improved is CRM integration as it has some bugs that we hope to be fixed and improved in next version.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Amazing and I already referred 3 more companies to it, who are all happy.
author: Matvey C.
pros: I like the flexibility of the tool and how complex you can make your outreach structure and sequences.
cons: At first the interface was a bit rough but it go better.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Eve M.
pros: The idea that you dont need to chat manually
cons: the upload from sales navugator feature does not work
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: One of the most liked feature was the LinkedIn Cloud Automation service. Recommended this software to other teams too.
cons: The software's response time was a bit slow and freezed multiple times.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Veronika E.
pros: It is very easy to set up and onboard the team, the usage is very native and fast to understand. It has all needed features.
cons: The only problem for our organisation is absence of salesforce native integration
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: I made a change to the LinkedIn automation platform
